UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user within the KeyFlow Pro application, focusing on profile details relevant for key assignments and administrative tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity (Auth UID).

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The primary email address of the user.

employeeId.description: An optional employee ID or staff number for the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system.

HardwareTrigger.title: HardwareTrigger
HardwareTrigger.description: A signal sent to hardware (ESP32) to perform an action like triggering a solenoid.

payload.description: Optional data for the action, like an OTA URL.

CabinetStatus.title: CabinetStatus
CabinetStatus.description: Live state of the physical key cabinet reported by ESP32.

pegStates.description: Map of peg index to presence (true = key in, false = key out)

Key.title: Key
Key.description: Represents a physical key managed by the KeyFlow Pro system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Key entity.

description.description: The category or type of the key (e.g., 'Workshop', 'Room').

currentStatus.description: The current status of the key (e.g., 'available', 'checked_out', 'overdue').

lastCheckoutTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the key was last removed from the cabinet.

pegIndex.description: The physical position/peg index in the hardware cabinet.

maxBorrowDurationHours.description: Maximum hours a key can be borrowed before considered overdue.

pegCount.description: Total number of physical key slots in the cabinet hardware.

lastFirmwareUrl.description: The URL of the last successfully pushed firmware binary.

Complaint.title: Complaint
Complaint.description: A problem report or complaint submitted by a user to the system admin.

SystemLog.title: SystemLog
SystemLog.description: A recorded event for auditing system activity.

/user_profiles/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profile data including roles.

/hardware_triggers/{triggerId}.description: Collection monitored by ESP32 to trigger solenoids.

/cabinet_status/{statusId}.description: Stores live status of the physical hardware cabinet.

/keys/{keyId}.description: Main collection for managing the inventory of physical keys.

/system_logs/{logId}.description: Audit logs for tracking system-wide activity.
